testcase.name: test_login[chromium-case0]

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Page.fill: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator("input[name='username']")

testcase.failure:
page = <Page url='https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/login'> case = {'expected': {'error_visible': False, 'outcome': 'success', 'stays_on_page': False, 'url_contains': '/dashboard'}, 'inputs': {'password': 'admin123', 'username': 'Admin'}, 'name': 'valid_login'}
@pytest.mark.parametrize("case", test_cases) def test_login(page: Page, case): page.goto(APP_BASE_URL + "/login") > page.fill("input[name='username']", case["inputs"]["username"])
tests\login_test.py:100: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ .venv\Lib\site-packages\playwright\sync_api\_generated.py:10177: in fill self._sync( .venv\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_page.py:893: in fill return await self._main_frame.fill(**locals_to_params(locals())) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_frame.py:607: in fill await self._fill(**locals_to_params(locals())) .venv\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_frame.py:619: in _fill await self._channel.send("fill", self._timeout, locals_to_params(locals())) .venv\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <playwright._impl._connection.Connection object at 0x0000016DFEE4EF50> cb = <function Channel.send.<locals>.<lambda> at 0x0000016DFF193F60> is_internal = False, title = None
async def wrap_api_call( self, cb: Callable[[], Any], is_internal: bool = False, title: str = None ) -> Any: if self._api_zone.get(): return await cb() task = asyncio.current_task(self._loop) st: List[inspect.FrameInfo] = getattr( task, "__pw_stack__", None ) or inspect.stack(0)
parsed_st = _extract_stack_trace_information_from_stack(st, is_internal, title) self._api_zone.set(parsed_st) try: return await cb() except Exception as error: > raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Page.fill: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. E Call log: E - waiting for locator("input[name='username']")
.venv\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_connection.py:559: TimeoutError

testcase.name: test_login[chromium-case1]

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Page.fill: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator("input[name='username']")

testcase.failure:
page = <Page url='https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/login'> case = {'expected': {'error_visible': True, 'outcome': 'error', 'stays_on_page': True, 'url_contains': '/login'}, 'inputs': {'password': 'admin123', 'username': 'InvalidUser'}, 'name': 'invalid_username'}
@pytest.mark.parametrize("case", test_cases) def test_login(page: Page, case): page.goto(APP_BASE_URL + "/login") > page.fill("input[name='username']", case["inputs"]["username"])

async def wrap_api_call( self, cb: Callable[[], Any], is_internal: bool = False, title: str = None ) -> Any: if self._api_zone.get(): return await cb() task = asyncio.current_task(self._loop) st: List[inspect.FrameInfo] = getattr( task, "__pw_stack__", None ) or inspect.stack(0)

E Call log: E - waiting for locator("input[name='username']")

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Page.fill: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator("input[name='username']")

testcase.failure:
page = <Page url='https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/login'> case = {'expected': {'error_visible': True, 'outcome': 'error', 'stays_on_page': True, 'url_contains': '/login'}, 'inputs': {'password': 'wrongpassword', 'username': 'Admin'}, 'name': 'invalid_password'}
@pytest.mark.parametrize("case", test_cases) def test_login(page: Page, case): page.goto(APP_BASE_URL + "/login") > page.fill("input[name='username']", case["inputs"]["username"])

async def wrap_api_call( self, cb: Callable[[], Any], is_internal: bool = False, title: str = None ) -> Any: if self._api_zone.get(): return await cb() task = asyncio.current_task(self._loop) st: List[inspect.FrameInfo] = getattr( task, "__pw_stack__", None ) or inspect.stack(0)
